Video.summary: Jayshanice suspects her physically abusive boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Scared to Death

Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: Jackie and her children live with a registered sex offender; accused of touching his own son, Ronnie takes a lie-detector test and demands a DNA test too.
Video.title: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Image.alt: You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids
You Chose the Abuser over Your Kids

Video.summary: Curtis sat down with his mother Telisha, and told her that he is trying to have a baby but Telisha was shocked and terrified because Curtis is only 13 years old! Curtis insists he is ready to be a father.
Video.title: 13 Year Old Father?

Video.summary: Nathan currently has 4 children with 2 different women and is in a serious mountain of trouble. Jamie, his first baby's mother, is tired of his lasting neglect for their 3 kids and needs him to step up to the role.
Video.title: You Call Yourself A Father?

Video.summary: Will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone’s men were faithful? Or something more sinister?
Video.title: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody

Image.alt: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody

Video.summary: Cassey believes she recently uncovered her ex-husband Calvin’s evil deeds, which he was trying to cover up with gifts for his daughter, but did he actually molest her daughter? Or has she had it all wrong?
Video.title: I Want Justice for My Daughter

Image.alt: I Want Justice for My Daughter
I Want Justice for My Daughter
I Want Justice for My Daughter

Video.summary: Evan says his girlfriend's sister made up the story that they had sex; Sarra's much-older husband accuses her of having sex with her own cousin.
Video.title: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Image.alt: Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!
Your Sister Is Lying: We Never Had Sex!

Video.summary: Thomazina’s boyfriend died a year ago and she thinks her daughter, Destiney slept with him! She also suspects Destiney tried to poison her with bleach! In December, Chris and Jesse’s baby died and they blame Jesse’s mother!
Video.title: My Daughter Tried to Poison Me

Image.alt: My Daughter Tried to Poison Me
My Daughter Tried to Poison Me
My Daughter Tried to Poison Me

Video.summary: After Juanita’s mother was murdered, things became strange, especially when her father Eric didn’t attend the funeral. She believes he was involved in the murder, but her sister Nora thinks she’s crazy. Can Steve help put this mystery to bed?
Video.title: Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?

Image.alt: Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?
Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?
Dad, Did You Murder Our Mom?

Video.summary: Russell wants to put his family back together after his 3 children died in a fire. Next, Tatiana believes her 2-year old nephew was abused. And she's accusing her sister's ex-fiance Chris. Chris says he's not an abuser.
Video.title: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Image.alt: Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?
Did You Leave My Kids to Die?

Video.summary: Taquita’s ex is in custody for murdering her child, but her step-sisters think that she was aware of the man’s abusive behavior! Then, Dianne gained custody of Tanya’s toddler son after Tanya’s ex shook him, but she suspects Tanya is the abuser!
Video.title: You Failed to Protect Your Son

Image.alt: You Failed to Protect Your Son
You Failed to Protect Your Son
You Failed to Protect Your Son

Video.summary: Katrina believes her sister Kendra’s boyfriend is a cheater and having sex with her best friend Nay-Nay! Later, John previously faced abuse allegations and has returned with a shocking update!
Video.title: This Should Be Explosive…

Video.summary: At seventeen, Dimitrius has already had three children and now four additional women claim to be pregnant with his baby. Then Ethel and her daughters need Steve's help to right their wrongs and get their family back on track.
Video.title: Steve's Had Enough

Video.summary: Cynthia says her two teen daughters are sexually active and out of control. She worries their actions will lead them to an early grave.
Video.title: I'm 15 and I Love Sex

Video.summary: Jared says that he is positive that his wife Sarah is cheating on him and he admits to physically abusing Sarah because he says he hates being lied to. Sarah, who is pregnant, says that she's desperate to stop Jared's abusing ways.
Video.title: My Kids Watch Him Hit Me

Image.alt: My Kids Watch Him Hit Me
My Kids Watch Him Hit Me
My Kids Watch Him Hit Me

Video.summary: Taking a stand! After years of abuse and living in fear, Kristen finally thought she found the strength to leave her abusive relationship with Terrell behind. He openly admits to abusing Kristen and taking his rage out on her, but thinks he can change for the better. Changing a bad habit is never easy, but Steve may be the last hope this family has.
Video.title: You Won't Beat Me Again

Video.summary: Trisha suspects her boyfriend Ernie of drugging her so he can sleep with her teenage daughter Zhane.
Video.title: Steve Helps Families Destroyed by Drugs

Image.alt: Steve Helps Families Destroyed by Drugs
Steve Helps Families Destroyed by Drugs
Steve Helps Families Destroyed by Drugs

Video.summary: Stephanie wants to prove to her husband, Mathew that she's not having sex with her own family member!
Video.title: We Can't Live Like This

Video.summary: Trish says that her on-and-off boyfriend Jake is abusive and cheating, but Jake says she’s lying.
Video.title: Steve Got it Wrong?

Video.summary: Today, Steve hosts his very own teen girl town hall. No question is off limits!
Video.title: Teen Girls: Tough Topics

Video.summary: Dennis says his ex Kendal ties him down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his!
Video.title: Did You Fake Your Pregnancies?

Video.summary: Jasmine’s 11 year old sister Lauren has had multiple sexual partners, stays out of the house for days on end and is headed on a downward spiral! Watch as Steve tries to help this troubled child and set her mother straight!
Video.title: Tragic Tale of Two Sisters

Video.summary: Steve will put Brittany’s sister Jami and boyfriend Luis to the lie detector test to find out if Luis coerced Jami into having sex. Then, did Cassandra sleep with her husband Greg’s brother Collin? Is Collin their child’s father? Find out today!
Video.title: Betrayed By My Family?

Video.summary: Sabrionna found many photos, videos, and messages from other women on her husband Anthony’s phone.
Video.title: I'm Pregnant, Is He Cheating?

Video.summary: Hannah is tired of Nick's crazy accusations, hacking into her computer and texting her friends pretending to be her. Then, Nicole says she's never cheated on her husband Robert. She also claims that the constant accusations caused her to miscarry.
Video.title: You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?

Image.alt: You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?
You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?
You Beat Them Up, What If They Pass?

Video.summary: Angela and James have separated after many years of marriage and she believes that James' new girlfriend has molested her daughters. Now she is demanding a lie detector test! Plus, Stevisha's husband Ira thinks she's cheating.
Video.title: Bitter Ex or Concerned Mother?

Video.summary: After 10 years of searching, Brenda will reunite with her kids and address abuse allegations. Then, Cassidy wed Paul 5 days after she split with PJ, but is he molesting her and PJ’s son? Or is PJ the monster who burned their son’s feet?
Video.title: "I'm Terrified of the Results"

Video.summary: Ashley and DeNorris accuse each other of cheating; Jim denies having sex with his fiancee's sister and underage girls.
Video.title: I Got a Bad Feeling About This

Image.alt: I Got a Bad Feeling About This
I Got a Bad Feeling About This
I Got a Bad Feeling About This

Video.summary: Brandi and Marty have been together 5 years. Brandi's brother and her mother claim that Marty is being physically abusive and has been cheating. Plus, Jessica worries that Derwin is now cheating on her and claims that he's been abusive towards her.
Video.title: Steve, I'm Not An Abuser

Video.summary: Gina separated from her husband Nate because she could never get along with his family. But Nate says that he's always had suspicions that their child wasn't really his. Then, Damond says that he doubts that he's the real father of Kendahl's child.
Video.title: DNA: It's Your Baby

Video.summary: Roberta suspects that her husband Bryan has been cheating. Find out whether these men are really the father!
Video.title: DNA: Don't Run From the Results

Image.alt: DNA: Don't Run From the Results
DNA: Don't Run From the Results
DNA: Don't Run From the Results
